text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder has invited me to help with a
harvest.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Phew... That should do it, I think. Just look at this
bounty of vegetables.
choice_data_list: What made you want to help out with farming?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The vegetarian diets of Buddhist monks caught
my attention recently. My own diet lacks
consistency, and I seem to have put on a little
weight because of it.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I figured I should increase my intake of fresh fruits
and vegetables, and so I got permission to help
with the harvests.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
A change in diet clears the mind... It's wonderful
what opportunities Japan has to offer. ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I can't wait to cook with these tonight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder comes up to me a few days later
and happily tells me how her new diet has been
working wonders.
